name: Cognition & Mood
description: Neurotransmitter-system variants affecting learning, mood, and neuroplasticity.

snps.description: Brain-derived neurotrophic factor. Met allele (T) reduces activity-dependent BDNF secretion.

CT.note: Val/Met — modest reduction in activity-dependent plasticity.

TT.note: Met/Met — reduced plasticity; aerobic exercise and novel learning particularly important.

snps.description: Dopamine D2 receptor density — A1 allele reduces receptor density.

AG.note: A1/A2 — reduced density; associated with reward-seeking phenotypes.

AA.note: A1/A1 — lowest density; higher reward threshold.

snps.description: G allele associated with higher empathy and social sensitivity; A allele with lower.

AA.note: Lower reported empathy / prosocial scores — trait-level.
